install.bannerDesc: Install the app on {platform} for fast access right from your home screen.

ios.1: Open NeroAI Studios in Safari (it won't work in other browsers).
ios.2: Tap the Share button (square with an up arrow) in the bottom bar.
ios.3: Scroll down and select Add to Home Screen.
ios.4: Tap Add in the top right corner. The app will appear on your home screen!

android.1: Open NeroAI Studios in Chrome or your browser.
android.2: Tap the three-dot menu in the top right corner.
android.3: Select Install app or Add to Home screen.

mac.1: Open NeroAI Studios in Chrome or Edge.
mac.2: Click the install icon in the address bar, on the right.
mac.3: Confirm installation. NeroAI will appear as an app in Finder and Dock.

windows.1: Open NeroAI Studios in Chrome, Edge, or Firefox.
windows.2: Click the install icon in the address bar or browser menu.
windows.3: Confirm installation. NeroAI will appear as an app in the Start Menu.

linux.1: Open NeroAI Studios in Chrome or Chromium.
linux.2: Click the browser menu and select Install NeroAI Studios.
linux.3: Confirm installation. The app will appear in your application menu.

desktop.1: Open NeroAI Studios in Chrome, Edge, or Firefox.
desktop.2: Look for the install icon in the address bar or browser menu.
desktop.3: Confirm installation for quick access from your desktop.

install.tipMobile: After installation, NeroAI will behave like a native app — it will open fullscreen without the browser address bar.
install.tipDesktop: After installation, NeroAI will appear as a separate app with its own icon in your taskbar/dock. It will open without the browser address bar.
install.showBannerDesc: Show the install suggestion in the app.

welcome.title: Welcome to NeroAI!
welcome.body: Thanks for joining. Explore features and connect with the community!

news1.title: New AI Tools Available
news1.body: Check out the latest Stable Diffusion models and workflows shared by the community.

event1.title: Weekly Art Challenge
event1.body: This week's theme: Futuristic Cityscapes. Submit your entries by Friday!

news.title: News & Updates
news.subtitle: Stay up to date with the latest from NeroAI Studios — new tools, events, and community highlights.

1.title: Stable Diffusion XL Support Added
1.body: We've integrated SDXL into our Discord bot workflow. Generate stunning high-resolution images directly in our channels with improved detail and coherence.

2.title: Community Art Showcase — Winter Edition
2.body: Join us this Saturday for our monthly art showcase featuring the best AI-generated artwork from our members. Live feedback sessions and prizes for top entries!

3.title: Prompt Engineering Guide Released
3.body: Our team has published a comprehensive guide on writing effective prompts for Stable Diffusion, Midjourney, and DALL-E. Covers negative prompts, weighting, and style modifiers.

4.title: ComfyUI Workflow Library Launch
4.body: Access over 50 pre-built ComfyUI workflows for common tasks: upscaling, inpainting, ControlNet setups, and more. Copy and paste directly into your local setup.

5.title: 2,500 Members Milestone!
5.body: Our community has grown to over 2,500 active members! Thank you for being part of this journey. Special events and giveaways coming soon.

6.title: Weekly Hackathon: AI Music Generation
6.body: This week's hackathon focuses on AI music generation tools. Experiment with MusicGen, Riffusion, and more. Winners get exclusive server roles!

intro.title: NeroAI Studios Staff Hierarchy
intro.desc: Complete staff rank structure with permissions and responsibilities for each role.

desc.ceo: Chief Executive Officer of NeroAI Studios. Full control over the project, team, technology and strategic direction.
desc.developer: Lead platform developer. Full access to source code, technical configs and development tools.
desc.owner: Full control over the server, team and all features.
desc.co_owner: Team management, server configuration and all administrative operations.
desc.discord_dev: Discord bot developer. Access to bot commands, channel config and Discord integrations.
desc.admin: Server administration, bans, announcements and advanced moderation.
desc.manager_staff: Staff team management, activity coordination, moderator training and performance evaluation.
desc.designer: UI/UX design, server branding, graphics creation and visual identity for the community.
desc.head_mod: Coordinate moderators, bans and report management.
desc.moderator: Moderate conversations, delete content and process reports.
desc.partnership: Manage partnerships with other communities, negotiations and cross-platform collaborations.
desc.jr_mod: Basic moderation and user report processing.
desc.helper: Assist new members and answer general questions.
desc.content_creator: Create tutorials, guides and educational resources.
desc.trial_mod: Probation period for new moderators. Limited report access.
desc.member: Standard community member with basic access to all public features.

info.title: Server Information
info.subtitle: Everything you need to know about the NeroAI Studios community — from our mission to our channel guide.

about.description: NeroAI Studios is a vibrant Discord community dedicated to artificial intelligence enthusiasts. From digital artists to developers and researchers, here you'll find a friendly space to explore, learn, and create together with the latest AI technologies.
about.missionText: We aim to democratize access to AI tools and build a community where everyone can learn, create, and collaborate. We believe the future belongs to those who understand and use artificial intelligence creatively and responsibly.
about.value1Desc: We explore the latest AI technologies and make them accessible to everyone.
about.value2Desc: We learn from each other and build projects together.
about.value3Desc: Everything is free and open for anyone passionate about AI.
about.value4Desc: Every member is encouraged to continuously develop their skills.

team.title: NeroAI Team
team.subtitle: The team members who manage the community and keep the server running.

roleDesc.admin: Manages the server, configurations, and team members.
roleDesc.moderator: Moderates conversations, enforces rules, and helps members.

rules.importantDesc: Accepting the rules is required to activate your account. Repeated violations can lead to suspension or ban.
rules.sanctionsText: Violating the rules can result in progressive sanctions, from warnings to permanent ban, depending on the severity of the situation.

faq.subtitle: Answers to the most frequently asked questions about our community.

1.q: How do I join the Discord server?
1.a: Click the Join on Discord button on the site or use the link discord.gg/neroai. It's free and you don't need a special invitation.

2.q: Do I have to pay to use the AI tools?
2.a: No! All tools and resources offered by the community are completely free for members. Some external tools may have their own pricing plans.

3.q: How can I become a moderator?
3.a: Moderator roles are given to active members who demonstrate involvement, knowledge, and rule compliance. The admin team selects moderators periodically.

4.q: What kind of AI art can I post?
4.a: Any creation generated with AI tools is welcome in dedicated channels. Content must follow community rules — no offensive or illegal material.

5.q: How does the XP and level system work?
5.a: You earn XP for daily activities (login, posts, replies). The more active you are, the more you level up. Higher levels unlock special badges and roles.

6.q: Can I suggest new features for the server?
6.a: Absolutely! Use the suggestions channel on Discord or the Forum section on the site. The team reviews all suggestions and implements the most popular ones.

history.subtitle: NeroAI Studios' journey from idea to today's vibrant community.

1.title: NeroAI Studios Founded
1.desc: A small group of AI enthusiasts creates the Discord server with the vision of building an open community for creators and developers.

2.title: 100 Members
2.desc: The community reaches its first milestone — 100 active members. We organize our first AI art hackathon.

3.title: Custom AI Bots
3.desc: We launch the first Discord bots for image generation with Stable Diffusion directly in channels.

4.title: Workflow Library
4.desc: We publish over 50 pre-built ComfyUI workflows for the community.

5.title: 1,000 Members
5.desc: The community doubles in size. We organize monthly AI art exhibitions with prizes.

6.title: SDXL Support
6.desc: We integrate Stable Diffusion XL into all bots for high-resolution images.

7.title: 2,500+ Members
7.desc: NeroAI Studios becomes one of the largest AI communities on Discord. We launch the web portal and forum.
